name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve minishell
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce

1. Start miniRT with '...'
2. Observe the error '...'
3. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

A clear description of what actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots/Output

If applicable, add screenshots or command output to help explain your problem.

```bash
# Paste command output here
```

## 🖥️ Environment

- OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 13.0]
- Compiler: [e.g., gcc 11.3.0, clang 14.0.0]
- Shell comparison: [e.g., bash 5.1.16]

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

## 🔍 Possible Solution

If you have an idea of what might be causing this, please describe it here.

## ✔️ Checklist

- [ ] I have checked the existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have tested this in the latest version
- [ ] I have provided all necessary information
- [ ] I can reproduce this consistently
